src: A tall, cylindrical stone tower with three turrets, arched windows, and decorative brickwork. The stone is a light brown color with various small openings and a flagpole atop the central turret.
edit: A towering, angular structure with harsh lines and concrete panels, featuring slender, vertical windows and a minimalist facade. The brutalism style emphasizes rawness and functional geometry with a central spire.

per_image_non_shared_src.colin-watts-3blV4-86aUo-unsplash: The object stands prominently on a hilltop with a wide view of surrounding fields. Trees flank the distant horizon under a sky filled with warm, golden sunset hues.
per_image_non_shared_src.david-tip-IU8E-824a-s-unsplash: The object stands on a grassy mound with people walking nearby. Puffy white clouds dot a bright blue sky, casting shadows onto the rolling landscape.
per_image_non_shared_src.liv-cashman-Ckmk6hauXEM-unsplash: The object is depicted in a close-up, focusing on its detailed brick facade and intricate balconies. The sky is clear, enhancing the architectural details against the blue.
per_image_non_shared_src.marc-najera-t3uc1FTTG_Y-unsplash: The object is centered on a grassy landscape with people resting on the slope. The sky is partly cloudy with some patches of blue visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.samuel-girven-fCJULElraUE-unsplash: The object is viewed from below with a fenced area nearby. The grass is sparse, and the sky is overcast with soft light filtering through.

per_image_non_shared_edit.colin-watts-3blV4-86aUo-unsplash: The object stands prominently on a hilltop with a wide view of surrounding fields. Trees flank the distant horizon under a gloomy overcast sky, typical of gloomy weather.
per_image_non_shared_edit.david-tip-IU8E-824a-s-unsplash: The object stands on a grassy mound with people walking nearby. Thick, gray clouds fill the sky, fitting the gloomy weather ambiance of the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.liv-cashman-Ckmk6hauXEM-unsplash: The object is depicted in a close-up, focusing on its concrete facade. The sky is uniformly gray, enhancing the minimalist brutalism architecture against the backdrop.
